prestazioni: BMW B48B20C (2.0L turbocharged inline-4) engine swap with a Garrett GT3076R turbocharger, custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe, and a CSF Racing high-flow intercooler to push 350+ HP while retaining the original Morgan chassis balance
Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (custom valved for the Plus 4’s leaf-sprung front and live-axle rear) paired with polybushings from SuperPro (UK) to eliminate compliance while preserving ride comfort
AP Racing CP8660-1000 front brake kit (330mm rotors, 4-piston calipers) with Ferodo DS2500 pads and Goodridge G-Stop braided stainless steel brake lines for consistent stopping power under track use
estetica: Custom aluminum louvered bonnet (handcrafted by RS Limited in the UK) with a central NACA duct to feed the CSF intercooler, finished in satin black powder coat

Morgan Plus 4-specific Rocket Bunny widebody kit (fiberglass over steel reinforcement) with integrated side skirts and a ducktail spoiler, painted in British Racing Green with gold pinstriping by Trimite
Smiths Instruments retro-styled 120mph speedometer and 8,000rpm tachometer (converted to electronic drive) with LED backlighting in amber, housed in a machined aluminum gauge pod by Stack Ltd.
